title: cassia rostrata
intro: Cassia rostrata, also known as the Sword Bean or Indian Sword Bean, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Cassia rostrata include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Cassia rostrata is often used in the form of tea, infusion, or powder, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
